description: Calligraphic get (bill of divorce). Dated the 19th of Kislev 5422 AM (1661 CE). Location: Damascus. Moshe b. Avraham known as Ibrahim repudiates Malkah known as Muluk bt. Eliyyahu known as Khidr. Signed by Elʿazar b. Noaḥ and Hayyim b. Eliyyahu. Both parties are listed as residents of Damascus.
description_he: מסמך משפטי בארמית. מוחזק בהספרייה הבריטית.
